title: Distrozi vs RouteNote
metaTitle: Distrozi vs RouteNote | Distrozi Music Distribution
metaDescription: Read about Distrozi vs RouteNote. Learn how to distribute your music globally, protect copyrights, and maximize streaming royalties with Distrozi.
author: Distrozi Editorial Team

content.text: Choosing your distribution partner is one of the most critical business decisions you will make as an independent artist or record label. While RouteNote is a highly recognizable company, artists are increasingly looking closer at hidden fees, rights management, and long-term costs. Distrozi provides a modern, premium alternative designed to maximize your revenue while protecting your masters.

Pricing transparency is a major point of difference. Offers a flexible model with a 100% free tier (taking a 15% split) and a premium tier (retaining 100% royalties for an upfront fee). Distrozi includes advanced catalog management, scheduled releases, and Rights Management on all standard plans without hidden annual charges.

Monetizing your music on YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram is essential. Distrozi integrates YouTube Content ID directly into its core platform. Rather than charging you annual maintenance fees per song like traditional aggregators, we ensure your catalog is protected and earning royalties from day one.

Music remains online on both free and premium tiers, allowing you to switch between plans at any time. Distrozi believes your music legacy belongs to you forever. If you choose to pause your subscription, we never delete your hard work. Your music stays online and continues earning royalties under standard administrative splits.

platformItems.name: Distrozi
platformItems.description: Premium distribution alternative with transparent pricing, zero hidden fees, and lifetime catalog protection.

platformItems.name: RouteNote
platformItems.description: Standard distribution platform: Offers a flexible model with a 100% free tier (taking a 15% split) and a premium tier (retaining 100% royalties for an upfront fee).
pros: No initial cost on free tier

faq.question: Is Distrozi cheaper than RouteNote over time?
faq.answer: Yes, because Distrozi doesn't charge hidden recurring fees for YouTube Content ID or release scheduling, saving you significant money as your catalog grows.

faq.question: Can I migrate my catalog from RouteNote to Distrozi?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Upload your tracks to Distrozi using the exact same audio files, metadata, and ISRCs, and then request a takedown from RouteNote once the releases are live.
